overview.short: St. Sebastian's Church, is a much-loved spiritual town in Delhi, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Sebastian's Church is located in Dilshad Garden in the city of Delhi, India. The church is dedicated to Saint Sebastian.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Dilshad Garden
topPlaces.description: Dilshad Garden is a residential area of Shahdara district, which was planned and developed by Delhi Development Authority in the late 1970s and early 1980s. It falls under the both Shahdara and Seemapuri constituency of the legislative assembly.

topPlaces.name: Ziauddin Pur
topPlaces.description: Ziauddin Pur is a village and census town in Mustafabad in North East district in the Indian state of Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Jhilmil metro station
topPlaces.description: The Jhilmil Station is located on the Red Line of the Delhi Metro.

topPlaces.name: Dilshad Garden metro station
topPlaces.description: The Dilshad Garden metro station is a station of the Red Line of the Delhi Metro. It was the terminal station of the Red Line till 7 March 2019.

topPlaces.name: Mansarovar Park metro station
topPlaces.description: The Mansarovar Park metro station is located on the Red Line of the Delhi Metro, India.

topPlaces.name: Shaheed Nagar metro station
topPlaces.description: The Shaheed Nagar is a metro station located on the Red Line of the Delhi Metro. It is located in the Sahibabad Industrial Area locality of Ghaziabad of Uttar Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Vivek Vihar
topPlaces.description: Vivek Vihar is one of 3 subdivisions of Delhi's Shahdara district, near the edge of Ghaziabad as well as a small neighbourhood in that subdivision located beside just besides the Choudhary Charan Singh road along with Uttar Pradesh border.

topPlaces.name: Shahdara metro station
topPlaces.description: The Shahdara metro station is located on the Red Line of the Delhi Metro.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Sebastian's Church,?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Sebastian's Church, is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Sebastian's Church,?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (26 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Sebastian's Church,?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Sebastian's Church, at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Sebastian's Church,?
faq.a: Stays in St. Sebastian's Church, start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Sebastian's Church,?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dilshad Garden, Ziauddin Pur, Jhilmil metro station, Dilshad Garden metro station, Mansarovar Park metro station.
